channel.title: Frontity update: 1 July 2019
channel.description:
Special thanks to [sagarnasit](https://github.com/sagarnasit) and [jamesgeorge007](https://github.com/jamesgeorge007) for their first contributions to Frontity! :tada::tada:
## Features - Add `rootMargin` support to our `<Image>` component for controlling when lazy load triggers (thanks to [sagarnasit](https://github.com/sagarnasit), PR [#142](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/142)) - Add `npx frontity info` command to get environment information for debugging purposes (thanks to [luisherranz](https://github.com/luisherranz), PR [#143](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/143)) - Warn the user on providing unknown commands (thanks to [jamesgeorge007](https://github.com/jamesgeorge007), PR [#151](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/151)) - Shows up help if no arguments were provided (thanks to [jamesgeorge007](https://github.com/jamesgeorge007), PR [#150](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/150))
## Docs - Add [“Code Contributions”](https://docs.frontity.org/contributing/code-contributions) to explain how to contribute to the Frontity core (thanks to [SantosGuillamot](https://github.com/SantosGuillamot)) - Improve [“wp-source” docs](https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1/wordpress-source) (thanks to [DAreRodz](https://github.com/DAreRodz))
## Bugs - return 404 if HMR endpoint gets through Webpack to Frontity (thanks to [luisherranz](https://github.com/luisherranz), PR [#144](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/144)) - Fixes misleading usage message in command line (thanks to [jamesgeorge007](https://github.com/jamesgeorge007), PR [#149 ](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/pull/149))
## Versions
```javascript - @frontity/components@1.1.5 - @frontity/core@1.1.2 - frontity@1.1.0 - @frontity/hooks@1.1.5 - @frontity/html2react@1.1.5 - @frontity/mars-theme@1.1.5 - @frontity/router@1.0.9 - @frontity/source@1.0.8 - @frontity/tiny-router@1.0.9 - @frontity/wp-source@1.1.5 ```

item.title: Frontity update: 1 July 2019
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Special thanks to sagarnasit and jamesgeorge007 for their first contributions to Frontity!

Features

  • Add rootMargin support to our <Image> component for controlling when lazy load triggers (thanks to sagarnasit, PR #142)
  • Add npx frontity info command to get environment information for debugging purposes (thanks to luisherranz, PR #143)
  • Warn the user on providing unknown commands (thanks to jamesgeorge007, PR #151)
  • Shows up help if no arguments were provided (thanks to jamesgeorge007, PR #150)

Docs

  • Add “Code Contributions” to explain how to contribute to the Frontity core (thanks to SantosGuillamot)
  • Improve “wp-source” docs (thanks to DAreRodz)

Bugs

  • return 404 if HMR endpoint gets through Webpack to Frontity (thanks to luisherranz, PR #144)
  • Fixes misleading usage message in command line (thanks to jamesgeorge007, PR #149 )

Versions

 - @frontity/components@1.1.5
 - @frontity/core@1.1.2
 - frontity@1.1.0
 - @frontity/hooks@1.1.5
 - @frontity/html2react@1.1.5
 - @frontity/mars-theme@1.1.5
 - @frontity/router@1.0.9
 - @frontity/source@1.0.8
 - @frontity/tiny-router@1.0.9
 - @frontity/wp-source@1.1.5

Read full topic
